name: HowLongToBeat API
description: Community-accessible interface to HowLongToBeat game completion time data. Provides search-by-game-name and game-detail lookups returning main story, main story plus extras, completionist, and all-styles average times in hours for thousands of video games. No official API key or authentication is required; access is via community wrappers that scrape or proxy the howlongtobeat.com website.

additionalProperty.name: officialAPIStatus
additionalProperty.value: No official public API. Community wrappers query the website directly.

additionalProperty.name: dataFields
additionalProperty.value: gameId, name, imageUrl, gameplayMain, gameplayMainExtra, gameplayCompletionist, timeLabels, similarity
